stemHtml: In an aircraft equipped with a Ram Air Turbine (RAT) that supplies hydraulic power to the flight controls, and with all main generators and the APU unserviceable, which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: The battery supplies all AC and DC consumers with power.
options.b: The battery supplies DC power to non-essential consumers, which is sufficient for continuation of the flight.
options.c: There is no emergency generator available, so all electrical power is lost.
options.d: The Ram Air Turbine provides hydraulic power only; electrical power is supplied by the emergency generator.
